t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from Dim_Customer via Username JOIN.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Appended provenance note ('Passthrough from Dim_Customer via Username JOIN'); no semantic loss from upstream description

issues.problem: No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x]/[ ] checkboxes. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' but doesn't specify which phases were completed or skipped.

Posts INSERT does not exclude SharedEntryId IS NOT NULL, so shared Discussion posts with RootId=ParentId=Id would be inserted as both Post (ActionTypeID=1) and Share (ActionTypeID=4). This potential duplication is not documented.
No explicit numeric quality score in footer as expected by golden shape reference.
Wiki says 'observed values include 5 and 6' without distribution counts. Flagged in review-needed but could be stronger with actual frequencies.
Shares are Discussion-type entries that have MessageBody available but the SP deliberately NULLs MessageText/Size/WordNum. This intentional suppression isn't explained in the business logic section.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor improvements only (PASS): (1) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with [x]/[ ] for P1-P3. (2) Add Gotcha about potential duplicate insertion for shared Discussion posts where RootId=ParentId=Id AND SharedEntryId IS NOT NULL. (3) Add numeric quality score to footer.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist section missing entirely — cannot determine which phases were skipped
